title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Motilal Oswal - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Motilal Oswal - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Motilal Oswal in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Motilal Oswal:
Motilal Oswal is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal!
